title: Portfolio Module launches next week
content_html:
The Cryptool Portfolio Module ships next week.

The module gives every Cryptool user a single, complete view of their investments, with:

  • Allocation across assets and categories at a glance
  • Status and performance per investment, updated live
  • Vesting schedules and the next unlock date for every position

The launch is the first step of a wider release. The OTC module, which brings on-platform secondary trading for vested and unvested positions, follows shortly after.
author: Cryptool
